name: Frozen S'mores
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the sugar-free instant chocolate pudding mix, skim milk, and peanut butter in a bowl until well mixed.
2. On half of the graham crackers, spread 1 tablespoon of the pudding mixture.
3. On the other half of the graham crackers, spread Lite Cool Whip.
4. Sandwich together the halves with the pudding and Cool Whip layers on top.
5. Freeze until ready to serve.
Each serving provides: Bread (1/4), Protein (1/4), Fat (1/4), and optional calories (18).
